prompt: Generate a minimalist website screenshot inspired by the reference layout, which is to introduce ChatGPT service.
prompt_refined:
Generate a minimalist website screenshot that introduces the ChatGPT service, adhering to the overall layout, spacing, and clean design style of image 1.
The page should feature a white background.
The top navigation bar should include a site logo/name on the left, followed by standard navigation links (e.g., Features, Pricing, Blog, Documentation) centrally, and a 'Login' button on the far right.
The main hero section should prominently feature a large, centered headline introducing ChatGPT, accompanied by a centered descriptive sub-headline. Below these, include two horizontally aligned, centered call-to-action buttons: one primary (dark) and one secondary (outlined).
Below the hero section, include a 'Key Features' section. This section should have a centered heading, a brief centered explanatory text, and three distinct feature cards arranged horizontally. Each card should present a relevant icon, a concise title, and a short description highlighting a core capability of ChatGPT.
objects: Navigation links (e.g., Features, Pricing, Blog, Documentation) centrally
Three horizontally arranged feature cards, each with an icon, title, and description
